sections.title: 1. Operations Safety
sections.content: Operators must secure safety shield guards and wear mandatory ANSI Z87.1 glasses before triggering spindle rotation.

sections.title: 2. Lubrication Cycle
sections.content: Lubricating oil level must be inspected before each shift. Replace filter elements every 250 operating hours.

sections.title: 1. Hydraulic Pressure Losses
sections.content: Verify hydraulic valves and inspect pressure indicators. Solenoid light green signifies normal output. Replace valve if red.
